name: Aleecha (Vegetable Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the cabbage.
2. Fry the onions in the butter until translucent.
3. Add the curry powder and cook for one minute.
4. Add 0.25 cup water to the onion mixture and cook for five minutes.
5. Add carrots and potatoes, then cook for 15 minutes.
6. Add cauliflower and cook for five minutes.
7. Add cabbage and cook for another 15 minutes.
8. Serves 8
